title: Featured Projects
description: A selection of projects that showcase problem-solving abilities, technical depth, and architectural thinking.

projects.title: TACO
projects.description: Commission management System for Insurance Agencies and Brokers
projects.problem: Insurance agencies and brokers face challenges in managing commissions efficiently, leading to delays and inaccuracies in payments. As well as spending excessive time on manual tracking and reporting.
projects.solution: Developed TACO, a web application that automates commission tracking, calculation, and reporting. It provides real-time updates and insights into commission statuses, improving transparency and efficiency.
challenges: Designing a scalable architecture to handle complex commission structures
Implementing real-time data synchronization across multiple users
Ensuring data security and compliance with industry regulations

projects.title: AudioBookSync
projects.description: Seamless audiobook synchronization platform for Audible users
projects.problem: Users struggle with not actually owning the books they purchase on Audible, leading to issues when switching devices or platforms.
projects.solution: Developed a cloud-based sync system that allows users to upload their Audible audiobooks and sync playback progress across multiple devices.
challenges: Syncing audio playback timestamps across devices accurately
Handling offline scenarios with eventual consistency
Optimizing cloud storage for media metadata

projects.title: ClubCRM
projects.description: Full-stack club management platform with role-aware admin workflows and a modular monolith backend
projects.problem: Student organizations and club operators need one system to manage membership, join requests, events, announcements, and access control without scattering workflows across forms, spreadsheets, and disconnected admin tools.
projects.solution: Built ClubCRM as a full-stack platform with a Next.js frontend, FastAPI backend, and a modular-monolith architecture that separates feature modules cleanly while supporting real CRUD workflows, backend-owned auth, and multi-database responsibilities.
challenges: Keeping the frontend and backend aligned while the UI surface evolved faster than the API contract
Designing clean module boundaries across auth, clubs, members, memberships, forms, events, and announcements
Using PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, and Kafka intentionally so each datastore had a clear responsibility instead of becoming incidental complexity

projects.title: ClubCRM Monitoring Stack
projects.description: Companion monitoring and control plane for a live networking and failover demo
projects.problem: The networking demo needed to stay observable even while VMs, pods, and storage-backed workloads were intentionally disrupted, which meant the team needed a separate control plane that could survive the same failures being demonstrated.
projects.solution: Built a standalone monitoring stack with a FastAPI control plane and Next.js dashboard that streams live environment snapshots, embeds the public failover view, exposes guarded VM and pod controls, and supports both live Kubernetes polling and snapshot-driven rehearsals.
challenges: Keeping the monitoring surface separate from the main product so demo instability did not take the dashboard down with it
Providing narrow, auditable control paths for VM power actions and container operations without exposing arbitrary shell access
Combining synthetic HTTP health checks, guest-agent telemetry, Kubernetes state, and storage visibility into one real-time operational view

projects.title: Home Lab Infrastructure
projects.description: Self-hosted infrastructure with Proxmox, Docker, and networking
projects.problem: Need for a scalable, self-hosted infrastructure to run multiple services while maintaining security, monitoring, and ease of deployment.
projects.solution: Built a complete home lab environment using Proxmox for virtualization, Docker for containerization, and Traefik for intelligent routing and reverse proxying.
challenges: Setting up secure networking with proper firewall rules
Managing SSL certificates and automatic renewal
Implementing proper monitoring and alerting systems
